landing.title: Scholesa
landing.tagline: 未來技能學院。賦能學習者、教育者與社群。
landing.heroEyebrow: 讓能力學習被清楚看見
landing.heroTitle: 讓真實能力成長擁有可驗證證據。
landing.heroBody: Scholesa 把課堂中的關鍵時刻轉化為可檢查的證明：觀察紀錄、學習者作品、獨立講解、量規判斷、成長歷史、作品集、報告和合作交付，都連接到支撐能力聲明的真實證據。
landing.commandCenterSubtitle: 捕捉、驗證、解讀並傳達成長。
landing.commandCenterQuestion: 每個視圖都回答同一個問題：這位學習者現在能做什麼，哪些證據讓這個聲明值得信任？

liveSession.label: 即時課堂
liveSession.detail: 教師在工作室時間內記錄

landing.roleSurfacesTitle: 六個角色。一條真實證據鏈。
landing.roleSurfacesBody: 學習者看到自己正在創造什麼。教育者在當下記錄證明。家庭、學校、總部和合作夥伴都能看到每個聲明背後的證據。

learner.label: 學習者
learner.proof: 任務、證明提示、作品集證據

educator.label: 教育者
educator.proof: 快速記錄、證明審核、驗證佇列

guardian.label: 監護人
guardian.proof: 帶證據連結的能力進展

school.label: 學校
school.proof: 實施健康度與證據覆蓋

partner.label: 合作夥伴
partner.proof: 面向證據的交付與合約

trustSignals.claimEvidence: 每個學習者聲明都能回到證據、情境和審核判斷
trustSignals.educatorCapture: 教育者能在課堂現場記錄有意義的觀察
trustSignals.familyProgress: 家庭能看到能力進展，而不是被分數或平均值取代
trustSignals.leaderCoverage: 學校和總部能透過證據覆蓋追蹤實施健康度

learners.label: 學習者
learners.detail: 知道自己在創造什麼、能解釋什麼，以及哪些內容屬於作品集

educators.label: 教育者
educators.detail: 在不打斷課堂節奏的情況下看到下一步證據行動

families.label: 家庭
families.detail: 透過真實作品理解成長，而不是模糊摘要或無法解釋的分數

leaders.label: 領導者
leaders.detail: 發現證據缺口、支持教師，並保護每個聲明的可信度

landing.finalCtaBody: 把證明、反思、回饋和可進入作品集的成果放進一條清晰流程。

privacy.title: Scholesa Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Scholesa is a capability-first evidence platform for schools and learning studios. This policy explains how Scholesa handles information in the web app and mobile app, including classroom evidence, learner reflections, and optional voice input used by the AI coach experience.
privacy.informationBody: Scholesa may process account profile information, school and site membership, session participation, learner artifacts, reflections, educator observations, proof-of-learning records, rubric judgments, capability growth records, portfolio outputs, support messages, device and diagnostic data, and audit records needed to keep evidence trustworthy.
privacy.voiceBody: The mobile app may request microphone access when a learner or educator uses voice input in the AI coach or related learning workflow. Audio is used to turn speech into text for the requested learning action. Scholesa does not use microphone access in the background. Users can deny or revoke microphone permission in device settings and continue using typed input.
privacy.useBody: Information is used to run learning sessions, capture and verify evidence, support educator feedback, update capability growth over time, communicate progress to authorized users, maintain safety and reliability, and meet school operational and compliance requirements.
privacy.aiBody: Where AI assistance is available, Scholesa treats AI as support rather than a substitute for learner understanding. The platform may keep records of AI-use disclosures, prompts, responses, learner changes, verification intent, and proof-of-learning so educators can evaluate authenticity.
privacy.sharingBody: Access is role-based. Learners, educators, guardians, school leaders, partners, and platform operators can only access information appropriate to their role, site, and permissions. Scholesa does not sell learner personal information.
privacy.storageBody: Scholesa uses tenant-scoped persistence, security rules, audit trails, and operational controls to protect evidence and account data. Schools and platform administrators determine retention and deletion requirements according to their agreements, legal obligations, and learning records policies.
privacy.contactBody: For privacy questions or school data requests, contact the Scholesa operator or the school organization responsible for the learner account.

summerCamp.heroTitleBefore: Young Innovators build future skills through
summerCamp.heroBody: A creativity-driven camp that helps young minds imagine, design, test, and explain ideas with helpful impact. Two weeks. Ten sessions. Real projects learners are proud to show.
summerCamp.capabilitiesTitle: Five durable capabilities, visible through real artifacts.
summerCamp.capabilitiesBody: Every session is designed around capability growth. Learners leave with skills they can show, explain, improve, and use.
summerCamp.scheduleTitle: Two weeks. Ten sessions. Every day builds on the last.
summerCamp.scheduleBody: Each session follows the Scholesa rhythm: hook, build, checkpoint, reflect. Learners always know what they are making and why.
summerCamp.differentiatorsTitle: Built for evidence, confidence, and real-world creativity.
summerCamp.differentiatorsBody: The camp experience stays playful, but the learning record is serious: projects, reflections, feedback, and showcase moments can become evidence learners are proud to revisit.
summerCamp.limitedTitle: Small groups. Big impact. Register early.
summerCamp.limitedBody: Cohorts are intentionally small to protect the learning experience. Reach out to hold your child's place for Scholesa Young Innovators Summer Camp 2026.

think.label: Think
think.detail: Notice problems, ask better questions, and reason from what you observe.

make.label: Make
make.detail: Design, build, test, and improve real things with physical materials.

communicate.label: Communicate
communicate.detail: Explain your ideas clearly to peers, educators, and families.

lead.label: Lead
lead.detail: Take initiative, contribute in team roles, and reflect on your impact.

world.label: Build for the world
world.detail: Create ideas that are helpful, fair, and meaningful beyond school.

week1.label: Week 1
week1.title: Young Inventors Lab
week1.description: Design, build, and prototype inventions that create helpful impact in the real world.

problem.name: What Problem Can I Solve?
problem.theme: Noticing needs in the world around us

sketch.name: Sketch It, Name It, Claim It

week2.label: Week 2
week2.title: Future City Builders
week2.description: Collaborate to design and build a smart, eco-friendly city of tomorrow through team projects and big ideas.

need.name: What Does Our City Need?
need.theme: Map your community and choose your city challenge

system.name: Design the Smart System
system.theme: Eco-friendly features, people, and planet thinking

city.name: Build the City - Team Sprint
city.theme: Roles assigned, building together, decisions made

pitch.name: Rehearse Your City Pitch
pitch.theme: Explain your design and prepare for showcase

showcase.name: City Showcase - Final Day
showcase.theme: Present to families and earn a portfolio badge

handsOn.title: Hands-on every day
handsOn.detail: Every session has a build sprint. Learners make something real instead of completing worksheets.

screenTime.title: Minimal screen time
screenTime.detail: Physical materials, teamwork, and face-to-face problem solving keep the experience grounded.

portfolio.title: Visible portfolio growth
portfolio.detail: Every learner leaves with artifacts, reflections, and evidence of capability growth.

impact.title: Ideas that help people
impact.detail: Every project asks who it helps and how. Purpose is built in from day one.
